name: Olive and Mint Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except olives according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. Program for whole wheat mode.
3. At the end of the mixing cycle, just prior to the kneading cycle, add olives (or mix all ingredients together).
4. Bake in a Welbilt ABM100 on the WHITE BREAD CYCLE with excellent results; no adjustments needed.
